🔀

Cross-Model Refuter

N same-model Claude refuters reduce variance, not bias — they share blind spots. This optional lane routes one quorum slot to a different model family (Codex/GPT). Flip the precondition gate to see a Claude slot swap to a cross-model slot (substitution, not addition), then run refutation.

Precondition gate (ALL must hold)

effort high / xhighnever on low/medium
ORK_ALT_MODEL_CMD seta non-Claude CLI; no key in-process
ORK_CROSS_MODEL != 0master kill switch
finding tier
ORK_CROSS_MODEL_MAX4
SQL injection in user_service.py:88 — request-changes blocker
refuters are blind: neutral claim + raw diff slice only (engine §1)
—
Set the gate, then Run refutation.
